success.description: You weep over the target, and as your tears fall upon him he is healed of all wounds, all critical wounds, all permanent or severe injuries, all diseases, all mutations, and all insanities

boon.description: The target recovers all fatigue and all stress

chaosStar.description: One of the target's mutations, diseases, critical wounds, insanities, or severe injuries is transferred from the target to you (GM's choice as to which)

sigmarsComet.description: You may make a Daunting (4d) Discipline (WP) check. If you pass, you do not remove this card from your action deck

success.description: You weep over the target, and as your tears fall upon him he is healed of all wounds, all critical wounds, all permanent or severe injuries, all diseases, all mutations, and all insanities

bane.description: You suffer wounds equal to half the wounds the target recovers

chaosStar.description: One of the target's mutations, diseases, critical wounds, insanities, or severe injuries is transferred from the target to you (GM's choice as to which)

sigmarsComet.description: You may make a Hard (3d) Discipline (WP) check. If you pass, you do not remove this card from your action deck
